name: memory
description: Persistent knowledge storage across agent sessions. Not crash-recovery state — accumulated institutional knowledge that survives task restarts. Providers handle storage format and retrieval. Consumers describe what to remember — Claude routes to the appropriate provider tool based on grants.

behavior.input: A key string and content string for storage. A key or query string for retrieval.
behavior.output: Confirmation of storage, or retrieved content, or search results with matching keys and excerpts
behavior.deterministic: Storage must succeed or return explicit failure. Retrieval returns content or explicit not-found.
